hero.title: Ibhuidisu ia Bibidia io Tambuijile
hero.lead: O divulu didi, di tanga o ikalakalu ia tokala ku bhanga o athu, kala o kikalakalu kia ku bhanga madivulu, ni ima ia mukuá ia lungu ni sidivisu ia ku boka.

header.kicker: Kikalakalu kia ku bhaka o madivulu
header.title: O dijina dia filiiale

intro: O milongi ioso ia lungu ni kikalakalu kiki, tu i sanga mu kaxa íii.

header.title: Kubhanga ioso phala kukuatekesa o athu kukala mu ididi ia kusakela

paragraphs: O IATF i tonginina kiambote o ima ia bhingi phala kubhanga o kikalakalu kiki.

emptyState.title: Ka soneka luua o jipondo ja beta-o-kota
paragraphs: O IATF ia mu pelepalala o milongi ia dianga phala o athu.
Eie u tena hanji ku tumikisa mukanda se ua mesena kuijiia dingi ia lungu ni muthu iú.
